systemInterfaceDesc: Control how the app looks and which locale it uses.
systemAssistantDesc: Set the global instruction and the default response personality.
systemAutomationDesc: Tune helper behaviors that run around every conversation.
systemDataDesc: Export or remove local browser data without changing cloud resources.
appearanceThemeDesc: Choose the visual theme used by the interface.
interfaceLanguageDesc: Use a fixed language or follow the browser preference.
fontSizeDesc: Adjust the base text size across the app.
personalizationDesc: Choose one reply personality that is appended to requests without changing the system instruction text.
systemPromptDesc: This prompt is injected into all conversations. Assistant-specific instructions will be inserted into the tag.
destructiveToolConfirmationDesc: Pause destructive tool calls for a one-time allow or deny decision. Other tool calls run automatically.
destructiveToolConfirmationAria: Require confirmation for destructive tool calls
autoTitleDesc: Create a summary title after first turn
htmlVisualPromptDesc: Guide models to use safe inline HTML for compact visual structures when helpful
htmlVisualPromptAria: Guide models to use safe inline HTML
autoCompressDesc: Summarize long histories to save tokens
exportAllDataDesc: Download a ZIP backup containing chats, settings, knowledge, and referenced local files. Credentials and remote caches are excluded.
exportError: Failed to export local data. Please try again.
restoreAllDataDesc: Validate a neo-chat ZIP backup and replace all current local app data. A v2 JSON export can be restored without its missing local files.
restoreAria: Select a neo-chat backup to restore
restoreCredentialsNotice: Restoring replaces current local data. Credentials are never restored and must be configured again.
restoreCredentialChecklistDesc: The restored data is ready, but these local credentials were intentionally excluded. Review each area before relying on its features.
legacyBackupWarning: This legacy JSON backup does not contain OPFS files. File references will be marked as unavailable.
incompleteBackupWarning: {count} referenced local files were missing when this backup was created.
restoreError: Failed to restore this backup. Current data was preserved.
dataCleanupDesc: Select one or more local data sources to remove. Persistent store groups reload the app after cleanup.
dataSourceCacheDesc: Plugin market, assistant market, skill catalog, skill definition, and model metadata caches.
dataSourceSettingsDesc: Theme, providers, defaults, API credential envelopes, plugin settings, and local secret master key.
dataSourceChatsDesc: Conversation metadata and per-session message records.
dataSourceChatFilesDesc: Documents, images, videos, and other files attached to chats.
dataSourceWorkspaceFilesDesc: Files stored for workspaces and workspace-linked context.
dataSourceKnowledgeDesc: Knowledge metadata, local knowledge files, and persisted RAG vector records.
dataSourceMemoryDesc: Long-term memory records and memory processing state.
dataSourceMediaDesc: Generated images and other media files stored in browser origin-private storage.
dataGroupStorageDesc: Cached catalogs, settings, providers, credentials, and local metadata.
dataGroupConversationsDesc: Chats, attached files, and generated media stored by this browser.
dataGroupKnowledgeDesc: Workspace files, knowledge records, vectors, and long-term memory.
clearAllDataDesc: Permanently remove all chats, settings, and local data.
clearConfirmHint: Click Confirm Clear within 5 seconds to permanently remove the selected local data sources.
clearError: Failed to clear all data. Please try again.
